chunks.text: Loss of Connections to Coeus and Project | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Loss of Connections to Coeus and Project Unfortunately, the changes we made during the scheduled maintenance window to provide bet

ng the scheduled maintenance window to provide better redundancy caused an unforeseen loss of connectivity to our NIS servers on one network. This resulted in loss of mounts to Coeus and Project. We rolled back the changes and service has been restor

olled back the changes and service has been restored. We will try again at a later date after we resolve the issue. Unfortunately, the issue was not discovered until after our scheduled downtime was over. We regret the inconvenience this caused. Reso

ver. We regret the inconvenience this caused. Resolved as of 2008-02-27 08:45:00 Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.s
utages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
